name: Civil Damages for Unauthorized Collection Actions

eligibility.description: Available when IRS officers disregard any provision of the IRC or regulations during collection; requires exhaustion of administrative remedies.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers can recover up to $1,000,000 for reckless/intentional disregard (or $100,000 for negligence) of tax laws by IRS employees during collection activities.
